title: A convention organizer doesn’t need a work permit - Canada.ca
content:
## To work in Canada as a convention organizer
You organize or run international meetings or conventions.
If this describes you, you don’t need a work permit.
You do need a work permit with a labour market impact assessment if
- you’re organizing  or running a Canadian event, or
- you provide “hands-on” services at events, such as audiovisual services show decorating building, setting up and taking down displays
- audiovisual services
- building, setting up and taking down displays

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
